-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_detailed_design
(
    detailed_design_id bigint NOT NULL,
    estimated_man_hour numeric,
    actual_man_hour numeric,
    internal_complaint numeric,
    external_criticism numeric,
    detailed_design_number_id bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_detailed_design_pkey PRIMARY KEY (detailed_design_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_detailed_design_detailed_design_number_id_key UNIQUE (detailed_design_number_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_detailed_design_number
(
    detailed_design_number_id bigint NOT NULL,
    detailed_design_type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    pgm numeric,
    job numeric,
    pages numeric,
    dcase_n numeric,
    dcase_m numeric,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_detailed_design_number_pkey PRIMARY KEY (detailed_design_number_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_development_language
(
    development_language_id bigint NOT NULL,
    development_language_name character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    project_id bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_development_language_pkey PRIMARY KEY (development_language_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_integration_testing
(
    integration_testing_id bigint NOT NULL,
    estimated_man_hour numeric,
    actual_man_hour numeric,
    test_case numeric,
    bugs_detected numeric,
    internal_complaint numeric,
    external_critism numeric,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_integration_testing_pkey PRIMARY KEY (integration_testing_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_loc
(
    loc_id bigint NOT NULL,
    new numeric,
    modified_denominator numeric,
    correction_amount numeric,
    loc_total numeric,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_loc_pkey PRIMARY KEY (loc_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_manufacturing
(
    manufacturing_id bigint NOT NULL,
    estimated_man_hour numeric,
    actual_man_hour numeric,
    internal_complaint numeric,
    external_critism numeric,
    loc_id bigint,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_manufacturing_pkey PRIMARY KEY (manufacturing_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_manufacturing_loc_id_key UNIQUE (loc_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_monitoring_result
(
    project_id bigint NOT NULL,
    internal_dqi numeric,
    external_dqi numeric,
    internal_cqi numeric,
    external_cqi numeric,
    internal_tqi_ut numeric,
    external_tqi_ut numeric,
    internal_tqi_it numeric,
    external_tqi_it numeric,
    internal_aqi numeric,
    external_aqi numeric,
    internal_review_count numeric,
    external_review_count numeric,
    dat_faults numeric,
    design_phase numeric,
    coding_phase numeric,
    unit_test_phase numeric,
    integration_test_phase numeric,
    design_phase_review_count numeric,
    coding_phase_review_count numeric,
    ut_phase_review_count numeric,
    it_phase_review_count numeric,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_monitoring_result_pkey PRIMARY KEY (project_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_project
(
    project_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY ( INCREMENT 1 START 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 CACHE 1 ),
    team_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    project_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    department_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    project_month date,
    project_type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    week_id bigint NOT NULL,
    project_level_id bigint,
    review_count_id bigint,
    system_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    difficulty_level character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    host_distributed character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    project_level character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT tbl_project_pkey PRIMARY KEY (project_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_project_review_count_id_key UNIQUE (review_count_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_project_level
(
    project_level_id bigint NOT NULL,
    project_level_name character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_project_level_pkey PRIMARY KEY (project_level_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_quality_index
(
    quality_index_id bigint NOT NULL,
    quality_index_code character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_quality_index_pkey PRIMARY KEY (quality_index_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_quality_threshold
(
    threshold_id bigint NOT NULL,
    project_level_id bigint NOT NULL,
    quality_index_id bigint NOT NULL,
    acceptable_min integer,
    acceptable_max integer,
    issue_min integer,
    issue_max integer,
    critical_min integer,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_quality_threshold_pkey PRIMARY KEY (threshold_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_threshold UNIQUE (project_level_id, quality_index_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_review_count_information
(
    review_count_id bigint NOT NULL,
    missing_information numeric,
    inconsistent_information numeric,
    unclear_information numeric,
    input_error numeric,
    rule_violation numeric,
    request_or_question numeric,
    mistake_in_pointing_out numeric,
    logic_omission_or_error numeric,
    detailed_design_id bigint NOT NULL,
    manufacturing_id bigint NOT NULL,
    unit_testing_id bigint NOT NULL,
    integration_testing_id bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_review_count_information_pkey PRIMARY KEY (review_count_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_review_count_information_detailed_design_id_key UNIQUE (detailed_design_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_review_count_information_integration_testing_id_key UNIQUE (integration_testing_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_review_count_information_manufacturing_id_key UNIQUE (manufacturing_id),
    CONSTRAINT tbl_review_count_information_unit_testing_id_key UNIQUE (unit_testing_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_unit_testing
(
    unit_testing_id bigint NOT NULL,
    estimated_man_hour numeric,
    actual_man_hour numeric,
    test_case numeric,
    bugs_detected numeric,
    internal_complaint numeric,
    external_critism numeric,
    CONSTRAINT tbl_unit_testing_pkey PRIMARY KEY (unit_testing_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dat.tbl_week
(
    week_id bigint NOT NULL,
    week_of_month character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT tbl_week_pkey PRIMARY KEY (week_id)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_detailed_design
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_dd_number FOREIGN KEY (detailed_design_number_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_detailed_design_number (detailed_design_number_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_detailed_design_detailed_design_number_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_detailed_design(detailed_design_number_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_development_language
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_dev_lang_project FOREIGN KEY (project_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_project (project_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_manufacturing
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_loc FOREIGN KEY (loc_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_loc (loc_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_manufacturing_loc_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_manufacturing(loc_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_monitoring_result
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_project FOREIGN KEY (project_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_project (project_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_monitoring_result_pkey
    ON dat.tbl_monitoring_result(project_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_project
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_project_level FOREIGN KEY (project_level_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_project_level (project_level_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_project
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_project_review FOREIGN KEY (review_count_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_review_count_information (review_count_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_project_review_count_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_project(review_count_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_project
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_project_week FOREIGN KEY (week_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_week (week_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_quality_threshold
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_threshold_project_level FOREIGN KEY (project_level_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_project_level (project_level_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_quality_threshold
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_threshold_quality_index FOREIGN KEY (quality_index_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_quality_index (quality_index_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_review_count_information
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_review_dd FOREIGN KEY (detailed_design_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_detailed_design (detailed_design_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_review_count_information_detailed_design_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_review_count_information(detailed_design_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_review_count_information
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_review_it FOREIGN KEY (integration_testing_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_integration_testing (integration_testing_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_review_count_information_integration_testing_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_review_count_information(integration_testing_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_review_count_information
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_review_manufacturing FOREIGN KEY (manufacturing_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_manufacturing (manufacturing_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_review_count_information_manufacturing_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_review_count_information(manufacturing_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS dat.tbl_review_count_information
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_review_ut FOREIGN KEY (unit_testing_id)
    REFERENCES dat.tbl_unit_testing (unit_testing_id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS tbl_review_count_information_unit_testing_id_key
    ON dat.tbl_review_count_information(unit_testing_id);

END;


***old pgsql erd script





ALTER TABLE dat.tbl_detailed_design_number
  -- Split PGM
  RENAME COLUMN pgm TO pgm_new;
ALTER TABLE dat.tbl_detailed_design_number
  ADD COLUMN pgm_modified NUMERIC;

  -- Split JOB
  RENAME COLUMN job TO job_new;
ALTER TABLE dat.tbl_detailed_design_number
  ADD COLUMN job_modified NUMERIC;

  -- Split Pages
  RENAME COLUMN pages TO pages_new;
ALTER TABLE dat.tbl_detailed_design_number
  ADD COLUMN pages_modified NUMERIC;

  ** to modify tb_detailed_design_number with new and moedified columns
